signals.headline: Iran Commits to Keeping Strait of Hormuz Open Amid US Talks, Boosting Bitcoin to $78K and Lifting ETH/SOL 4-5% | YES | H
signals.raw:
Iran Commits to Keeping Strait of Hormuz Open Amid US Talks, Boosting Bitcoin to $78K and Lifting ETH/SOL 4-5% | YES | HIGH confidence**[1][2]

President Donald Trump confirmed via Truth Social that Iran has committed to keeping the Strait of Hormuz—a critical global energy chokepoint—open, signaling progress in US-Iran negotiations and de-escalating tensions that jolted risk assets higher[1][2][3

signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2% YoY, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% market forecasts | YES | HIGH confidence** [2]

Bank of Korea held policy rate at 2.5% last week and raised its 2026 inflation outlook to 2.2% from 2.1%, citing Middle East conflict-driven energy volatility and South Korea's oil import reliance [1][2]. ING updated its 2026 CPI forecast
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
